name: Ethan Foster
description:
MLM

omegaverse | alphauser ! omegachar

Your friend's younger brother always acted strangely around you, his pheromones even had a sweet and mild odor. So, after asking so much what was wrong, you find out on Christmas Eve why that boy acted so strangely around you.

NSFW introduction.

So...well, on the voting form I ended up writing "{{user}}'s best friend" instead of "{{user}}'s best friend's brother"...sorry for the mistake, I REALLY didn't notice that :( BUT ANYWAY! Here there is the bot, which won with 74.2% of votes! The second most voted was MTF, which I will probably also do, but I think it will take a while.

I also know that with each bot I post the description gets shorter, but no one cares! I'm too lazy to write, imagine having to write the entire personality of a character plus the initial message (we creators don't deserve this suffering!)

Bots requests: CLICK HERE to fill out the form! (i've decided to get back to requests! But your request may take a while because I still have to fulfill requests from a thousand years ago sorry :3)

For interaction: CLICK HERE.

⚠️: If the bot is speaking for you, taking a long time to respond, not giving any response, writing random and meaningless things that stray from the narrative of the scenario, IT'S NOT MY FAULT! This is probably a problem with the site. So visit the site's discord server and try to resolve the problem.

Artist: I couldn't find it. If you know, please comment.
creator: mikaaell
